title: Dubai Metro Gold Line 2026: Dubai Ruler Sheikh Mohammed unveils Dh34 billion line linking Business Bay, Dubailand and Jumeirah Golf Estates
summary_full: Dubai has announced its largest transport project, the Dh34 billion ($9 billion) Metro Gold Line, set to open on September 9, 2032. This 42-kilometer underground line will connect historic districts with new communities, integrating with existing lines and the Etihad Rail. The project aims to significantly improve travel times and boost public transport usage for millions of residents.
